headline: IGE: Natural Resource ETF Benefits From Supply Imbalances But Has Underperformed Historically
summary: IGE ETF review: U.S./Canada natural resource exposure led by oil & gas; boosted by Hormuz crisis but lags S&P long-term. Read more macro analysis here.
